title: Chewy Q1 2025 Results: Revenue Up 8.3%, EBITDA Margin Expands to 6.2%
text: Chewy reported strong Q1 fiscal 2025 results with revenue up 8.3% and adjusted EBITDA margin expanding to 6.2%. The results demonstrate continued momentum in the company's profitability expansion trajectory. Both top and bottom lines beat the Zacks Consensus Estimate and increased year-over-year. Autoship customer sales grew 14.8% to $2.56 billion, outpacing overall net sales growth, with the metric representing 82.2% of total net sales, a record for the company. Net sales per active customer reached record levels, reflecting continued premiumization and category expansion. The 50 basis point improvement in adjusted EBITDA margin sequentially demonstrates the company's ability to convert revenue growth into profitability at scale. Management's confident 2025 guidance of 6-7% revenue growth and continued margin expansion through mix shift and operational leverage reinforces the path to the long-term 10% EBITDA margin target.
